extra.message: User input from query parameter 'username' is concatenated directly into a Jinja2 template string and rendered without sanitization. This allows Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI), enabling arbitrary Python code execution on the server.

User input from query parameter 'username' is reflected unsanitized in an HTMLResponse. An attacker can inject arbitrary HTML/JavaScript (e.g., <script>alert(1)</script>), leading to reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).
